name: atlas-assistente-pessoal
description: Atlas: assistente pessoal multiusuário com WhatsApp, Trello, lembretes e Segundo Cérebro.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n API,WORKER,WEB -c cyan,magenta,blue "npm run dev -w @atlas/api" "npm run dev -w @atlas/worker" "npm run dev -w @atlas/web"
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @atlas/shared && npm run build -w @atlas/database && npm run build -w @atlas/integrations
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @atlas/api && npm run build -w @atlas/worker && npm run build -w @atlas/web
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:apps
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test -w @atlas/shared && npm run test -w @atlas/database && npm run test -w @atlas/integrations && npm run test -w @atlas/api && npm run test -w @atlas/worker && npm run test -w @atlas/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck -w @atlas/api && npm run typecheck -w @atlas/worker && npm run typecheck -w @atlas/web
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run verify:release
